title: Status Monitor
description: The Status Monitor function block can be used to monitor and display user-defined states for devices, logics and inputs.

inputs.description: Connect one or multiple status inputs. The possible value-text pairs can be defined in the status dialog.

outputs.description: Room, name and status of last changed object with defined status text.
Number of devices or objects that do not match with any defined state value.
Number of devices or objects whose values match the corresponding defined status values of Cs1-10.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

properties.description: Number of entries in the activity log. 0: log is disabled The activity log tracks relevant changes since program start.
Choose subordinate status monitors to enable the aggregation of their states based on the text-value pairs defined by the primary status monitor.
